en: Elizabeth Blackwell, A Curious Herbal, Volume 1

A curious herbal, containing five hundred cuts, of the most useful plants, which are now used in the practice of physick. Engraved on folio copper plates, after drawings, taken from the life. By Elizabeth Blackwell. To which is added a short description of the plants; and their common uses in physick.
2 v. (Lvs. [iii], 1-63, [6], 252 lvs. of col. pls.; [i], 64-125, [6], 248 lvs. of col. pls.) engraved titles. 37.7 cm.
17 - Plate 2. Red, wild, or corn poppy
27 - Plate 6. Wild Tansie, or Silver Weed
61 - Plate 20. Meadow Trefoil or Clover Grass
117 - Plate 42. Ox-Eye Daisy, the Great Daisy
129 - Plate 47. Marum, or Syrian mastic Thyme
147 - Plate 53. Male Satyrion, or Male Fools
237 - Plate 89. Bear's Breech, or Brank Ursin
241 - Plate 91. Great Celandine or Yellow-horn Poppy
313 - Plate 119. Sharp Arsmart, or Water Pepper
335 - Plate 128. Horse Tongue or Double Tongue
351 - Plate 134. Mastich Time or Herb Mastich
363 - Plate 139. Agnus castus, or The Chaste Tree
369 - Plate 141. The Apple Tree or Pearmain
371 - Plate 142. Devil's Bit, or Smooth Succisa
385 - Plate 148. The greater Spurge or Palma Christi
413 - Plate 158. Wild Iris or Stinking Gladwyn
435 - Plate 167. The Common Calamint of the Shops
463 - Plate 178. The Wilding or Crab Tree
491 - Plate 189. The Pine Tree, or manur'd Pine
505 - Plate 195. The Mastich or Lentisk Tree
511 - Plate 197. The Sweet Cistus of Candy
525 - Plate 202. The Palm or Date Tree
527 - Plate 203. The male Fir, or Silver Fir
557 - Plate 215. Wall-fern or Polypody of the Oak
603 - Plate 233. Yellow Asphodel or King's Spear
